title: Move Action Bar
description: Action Bar Everywhere All at Once
body:
Move Action Bar lets you **drag and reposition your action bar anywhere** on your screen – no more being stuck with the default location.

# 🎮 Features:
Move the action bar freely using a built-in config screen.

Open the config with **Mod Menu** or by pressing the **K** key (configurable) in-game.

Config is saved automatically.

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer.

Made to be lightweight.

# 🛠️ How to Use:
- Press **K** (default keybind) or open the config from **Mod Menu**.
  
- Drag the action bar box to where you want it.
  
- Click Done – the new position will now be used in-game.

# 💡 Why?
Useful for accessibility, custom HUD layouts, or just personal preference. Works great on servers.
